Identity.Name: StingHVACSizingStrategies
Identity.Definition: Strategy code consumed by MepAutoSizeDuctCommand / MepAutoSizePipeCommand. Sets the optimisation target for branch-by-branch sizing: velocity-cap, equal Pa/m, static-regain recovery, or constant pressure. Picked from the HVAC Center header strip; mirrors the four strategies defined in STING_MEP_SIZING_RULES.json.

Governance.StandardsBasis: CIBSE Guide B3 §3.4 duct sizing methods; ASHRAE 90.1 Appendix G

Value.Definition: Velocity — cap maximum velocity per duct role (main / branch / runout). Simple, common, conservative. STING default for branches.
Equal Friction — size every section to the same Pa/m target. Best for trunk + branch systems with symmetric loads.
Static Regain — recover static pressure at each downstream fitting. Best for long, high-velocity systems with many takeoffs. Requires more iteration.
Constant Pressure — target total pressure drop across each branch. Used for unequal-length systems where balancing dampers are undesirable.
